languages.text: "Данная модель не способна к самостоятельной коммуникации на низком готике без надстроек. Это временная мера, необходимая для наглядности демонстрации, чтобы вы могли обращаться к Нунциусу напрямую".

"This model is not capable of independent communication in Low Gothic without supplementary equipment. This is a temporary measure necessary to provide a clear demonstration so that you may address Nuncius directly."
languages.original_text: "Данная модель не способна к самостоятельной коммуникации на низком готике без надстроек. Это временная мера, необходимая для наглядности демонстрации, чтобы вы могли обращаться к Нунциусу напрямую".

traits.locale_text: "This model is not capable of independent communication in Low Gothic without supplementary equipment. This is a temporary measure necessary to provide a clear demonstration so that you may address Nuncius directly."

"This model is not capable of independent communication in Low Gothic without supplementary equipment. This is a temporary measure necessary to provide a clear demonstration so that you may address Nuncius directly."

"This model is not capable of independent communication in Low Gothic without supplementary equipment. This is a temporary measure necessary to provide a clear demonstration so that you may address Nuncius directly."

languages.text: «Este modelo no puede comunicarse en Bajo Gótico sin equipamiento adicional. Esta medida temporal es necesaria para proporcionar una demostración clara y permitirle que se dirija directamente a Nuncius».
languages.original_text: "This model is not capable of independent communication in Low Gothic without supplementary equipment. This is a temporary measure necessary to provide a clear demonstration so that you may address Nuncius directly."

traits.locale_text: «Este modelo no puede comunicarse en Bajo Gótico sin equipamiento adicional. Esta medida temporal es necesaria para proporcionar una demostración clara y permitirle que se dirija directamente a Nuncius».

languages.text: “若无外接辅助设备，该型号无法使用低哥特语进行独立通讯。此乃必要之临时协议，旨在提供清晰的演示输出，以便您能与努恩修斯建立直接交互。”
languages.original_text: "This model is not capable of independent communication in Low Gothic without supplementary equipment. This is a temporary measure necessary to provide a clear demonstration so that you may address Nuncius directly."

traits.locale_text: “若无外接辅助设备，该型号无法使用低哥特语进行独立通讯。此乃必要之临时协议，旨在提供清晰的演示输出，以便您能与努恩修斯建立直接交互。”

languages.text: « Ce modèle n'est pas capable de communiquer en bas gothique sans équipement supplémentaire. Il s'agit d'une mesure temporaire qui vous permettra de vous adresser directement à Nuncius, ce qui est nécessaire pour vous faire comprendre clairement la situation. »
languages.original_text: "This model is not capable of independent communication in Low Gothic without supplementary equipment. This is a temporary measure necessary to provide a clear demonstration so that you may address Nuncius directly."

traits.locale_text: « Ce modèle n'est pas capable de communiquer en bas gothique sans équipement supplémentaire. Il s'agit d'une mesure temporaire qui vous permettra de vous adresser directement à Nuncius, ce qui est nécessaire pour vous faire comprendre clairement la situation. »

languages.text: "Bu model, ilave ekipman olmadan Adi Gotik dilinde bağımsız iletişim kurma kapasitesine sahip değil. Bu, Nuncius'a doğrudan hitap edebilmeniz adına net bir gösterim sunmak için gerekli ve geçici bir önlem."
languages.original_text: "This model is not capable of independent communication in Low Gothic without supplementary equipment. This is a temporary measure necessary to provide a clear demonstration so that you may address Nuncius directly."

traits.locale_text: "Bu model, ilave ekipman olmadan Adi Gotik dilinde bağımsız iletişim kurma kapasitesine sahip değil. Bu, Nuncius'a doğrudan hitap edebilmeniz adına net bir gösterim sunmak için gerekli ve geçici bir önlem."

languages.text: "Dieses Modell ist zu einer unabhängigen Kommunikation in Niedergotisch ohne ergänzende Ausrüstung nicht fähig. Dies ist lediglich eine vorübergehende Maßnahme im Sinne einer deutlichen Demonstration, damit Ihr Nuncius direkt ansprechen könnt."
languages.original_text: "This model is not capable of independent communication in Low Gothic without supplementary equipment. This is a temporary measure necessary to provide a clear demonstration so that you may address Nuncius directly."

traits.locale_text: "Dieses Modell ist zu einer unabhängigen Kommunikation in Niedergotisch ohne ergänzende Ausrüstung nicht fähig. Dies ist lediglich eine vorübergehende Maßnahme im Sinne einer deutlichen Demonstration, damit Ihr Nuncius direkt ansprechen könnt."

languages.text: "このモデルは、補助的な装置なしでは、低ゴシック語での独立した通信はできません。これは、あなたがヌンシウスに直接話しかけられるように、明確なデモンストレーションを行うために必要な一時的な措置です。"
languages.original_text: "This model is not capable of independent communication in Low Gothic without supplementary equipment. This is a temporary measure necessary to provide a clear demonstration so that you may address Nuncius directly."
